sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data XMLType);
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, data) VALUES (1, XMLType('<root><element>Hello World</element></root>'));
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, data) VALUES (2, XMLType('<root><element>Goodbye World</element></root>'));
SELECT id, data.setSchemaValidated() FROM xml_data WHERE data ILIKE '%Hello%';
SELECT sub.id FROM (SELECT id FROM xml_data) AS sub WHERE sub.id = 1 AND 'validated' ILIKE '%valid%';
SELECT id, data FROM xml_data WHERE data.setSchemaValidated() AND data ILIKE '<root>%';
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num1 INT, num2 INT);
INSERT INTO test_numbers (num1, num2) VALUES (10, 20), (NULL, 30), (5, NULL);
SELECT nt.num1, nt.num2, (nt.num1 + nt.num2) AS total FROM test_numbers nt WHERE (nt.num1::VARCHAR) ILIKE '1%';
SELECT id, data FROM xml_data WHERE data.setSchemaValidated() AND NOT (data ILIKE 'Goodbye%') OR (data ILIKE 'Hello%');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT nt.num1, nt.num2 FROM test_numbers nt WHERE nt.num1 ILIKE CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR)) AS temp;
CREATE TABLE temp_xml (temp_id INT PRIMARY KEY, temp_data XMLType);
SELECT * FROM temp_xml WHERE temp_data.setSchemaValidated() AND temp_data ILIKE '%Test%';
SELECT t.temp_id FROM (SELECT temp_id, temp_data FROM temp_xml) AS t WHERE t.temp_data.setSchemaValidated() AND (t.temp_data ILIKE '%temp%');
SELECT SUM(num1) OVER (PARTITION BY num2) FROM test_numbers WHERE num2 IS NOT NULL;
